title: SERVICE STATION DEALERS DAY
doc_html:
CHAPTER 14.  SERVICE STATION DEALERS DAY

IN COURT LAW

§1451.  Short Title

This Chapter may be cited as The Service Station Dealers Day in Court Act.  

Added by Acts 1974, No. 628, §1.
